**Setting event details**

I need to ensure that "startDate" and "endDate" correspond with the strike date of September 22, 2025. The document mentions this date and notes that a national strike will take place. So, I’ll set:

- startDate: "2025-09-22 00:00:00"  
- endDate: "2025-09-22 23:59:59"

The LocationType will be "NATIONAL," and locationCodes will be explicitly null. I'm also noting guaranteed service times: ["05:30-08:30", "16:30-19:30"]. Everything is lining up correctly!
